metadata.description: Austin's Claude Code plugin marketplace — opinionated DX plugins for agentic coding workflows.

plugins.name: modern-unix-tools
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to prefer modern Rust/Go/C++ replacements (ripgrep, fd, sd, bat, eza, zoxide, dust, hyperfine, tokei, delta, etc.) over classic Unix tools (grep, find, sed, cat, ls, cd, du, time, wc) with syntax divergence cheatsheets and anti-patterns.

plugins.name: kbac
plugins.description: Knowledge graph development toolkit — Cypher authoring guidance, TypeBox schema patterns, graph query design, and session context injection for the kbac Neo4j knowledge base
